game_info.title: Neon White - Speedrun FPS
game_info.concept:
Neon White is a single-player speedrunning FPS where you can sacrifice your guns for godlike parkour moves. Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though…

Features:

• You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption.



• Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities.



• Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts.



• Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?
game_info.description: You are Neon White, an assassin competing in a heavenly trial. Navigate through a stylized 3D arena, eliminating floating demon orbs while racing against time. Collect Soul Cards that function as both weapons and parkour abilities - use them to shoot enemies or sacrifice them for godlike movement powers. Chain together shots, dashes, and jumps to find the fastest route through each level. Eliminate all demons to complete the trial and achieve the best time possible.
game_info.controls:
W/Up Arrow: Move Forward
S/Down Arrow: Move Backward
A/Left Arrow: Strafe Left
D/Right Arrow: Strafe Right
Space: Jump (double-tap for special abilities when cards are available)
Shift: Dash Forward (consumes dash card if available)
Z: Shoot (consumes gun card if available)
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart
ENTER: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and camera controls. Verify that the player can move in all directions (forward, backward, strafe left/right) and that the first-person camera responds correctly to movement. This ensures the core navigation mechanics work properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in a circular pattern around the arena using WASD keys. Alternate between forward/backward and left/right movements. Jump several times to test vertical movement. Move continuously for 10 seconds to verify smooth camera tracking.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move smoothly in all directions without stuttering. The camera should follow the player's position and maintain a stable first-person perspective. Movement speed should be consistent and responsive. Test is successful if the player completes a full circle around the arena.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing combat mechanics and card system. Verify that Soul Cards spawn correctly, can be collected, and that shooting mechanics eliminate demon targets. This tests the core gameplay loop of collecting cards and using them as weapons.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Move toward visible Soul Cards to collect them. Once cards are collected, approach demon orbs and press Z to shoot them. Collect multiple cards and eliminate at least 3 demons. Verify that the card counter decreases when shooting and that demons are destroyed on hit.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Soul Cards should be collectible on contact. Pressing Z should fire a projectile that travels forward and destroys demons on impact. The card counter should decrease by 1 per shot. Demons should disappear with a visual effect when hit. Test is successful if 3+ demons are eliminated.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing parkour ability system. Verify that cards can be sacrificed for special movement abilities like dash and enhanced jumps. This tests the unique card-sacrifice mechanic that differentiates the game from standard shooters.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect Soul Cards and press Shift to perform a dash ability. Collect more cards and double-tap Space to perform an enhanced jump. Test both abilities multiple times to verify they consume cards and provide significant movement boosts. Attempt to chain abilities together.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Pressing Shift should consume a card and propel the player forward rapidly. Double-tapping Space should consume a card and provide extra jump height/distance. The card counter should decrease when abilities are used. Test is successful if both abilities work and can be chained for advanced movement.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing win condition and level completion. Verify that eliminating all demons triggers the win state and displays completion time. This ensures the core game objective and victory condition function correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Systematically collect cards and eliminate all demons in the arena. Move efficiently to find and destroy every demon orb. Once the last demon is eliminated, verify that the game transitions to the win state and displays the completion time.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: After eliminating all demons (typically 8-10), the game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. A victory message should appear showing the completion time. The game should allow restart via R key. Test is successful if the win condition triggers and time is displayed correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing collision detection and boundaries. Verify that the player cannot move outside the arena boundaries and that collision with platforms/walls works correctly. This ensures spatial constraints are properly enforced.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Move to the edges of the arena in all directions and attempt to pass through the boundaries. Try to move through platforms and obstacles. Jump onto elevated platforms to test vertical collision. Attempt to fall off the arena edges.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The player should be stopped by arena boundaries and cannot move outside the playable area. Platforms should be solid and support the player when landing on them. The player should not fall through the floor. Test is successful if all collision boundaries work correctly.
TEST_5.description: Testing collision detection and boundaries. Verify that the player cannot move outside the arena boundaries and that collision with platforms/walls works correctly. This ensures spatial constraints are properly enforced.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing the timer and speedrun mechanics. Verify that time tracking starts correctly, updates continuously during gameplay, and displays accurate completion times. This is essential for the speedrunning aspect of the game.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Start the game and verify the timer begins counting. Play for exactly 30 seconds while monitoring the displayed time. Complete a level as quickly as possible and note the final time. Restart and attempt to beat the previous time.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The timer should start at 0.00 when gameplay begins and increment smoothly. Time should be displayed prominently during play. Final completion time should be shown on the victory screen. Test is successful if timing is accurate to within 0.1 seconds.
TEST_6.description: Testing the timer and speedrun mechanics. Verify that time tracking starts correctly, updates continuously during gameplay, and displays accurate completion times. This is essential for the speedrunning aspect of the game.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing resource management and card economy. Verify that cards are limited, spawn strategically, and that players must make tactical decisions between shooting and using parkour abilities. This tests the strategic depth of the card system.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start with limited cards and attempt to complete the level using only shooting. Then restart and try using only parkour abilities. Finally, find an optimal balance between combat and movement. Count total cards available versus demons to eliminate.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The player should have slightly more cards than demons, forcing strategic decisions. Using all cards for shooting should make completion difficult. Using all cards for movement should make demon elimination impossible. Test is successful if a balanced approach is most effective.
